pages.text: The $(item)Storage Core$() is the heart of your system. Place it first.

Attach $(item)Storage Boxes$() to any face of the Core or chain them together in a connected multiblock. All connected boxes share their capacity with the Core.$(br2)Open the Core's GUI to view, search, and manage everything stored inside.
Add an $(item)Input Port$() to automate item insertion.

Place an $(item)Input Port$() on any face of the multiblock to pull items in from adjacent inventories or hoppers. Use an $(item)Extract Port$() or $(item)Eject Port$() to move items out. See $(bold)Port Blocks$() for details.
